caption:
At this year’s Rakugo Festival, I received a thoughtful gift from The Japan Foundation London. 
It included a sensu, a furoshiki, and a noshi envelope.
What made it especially meaningful was that it was my first time taking part by sending a digital video from Greece, so receiving these items felt like a lovely connection to the event despite the distance.
 I was very grateful to be included and to have this reminder of the experience.
